posts.title: Honhaar Scholarship - Document Verification
posts.body: To get your documents verified , you should go to the Tabish Alwari Building . Get your transcripts from Registrar Office (Room 12) .
posts.author: Ayesha Chouhadry

posts.title: CS-201 Data Structures : Best Professor?
posts.body: Dr.Omer Ajaml covers the concept very well and share handouts with important detail . The paper Checking also seems sensible.
posts.author: Maham Ashraf

posts.title: Annual Tech Fest - Registeration open!
posts.body: Register your team before May 30th at the Student Affairs Office.
posts.author: Imama Masood

posts.title: CM Laptop Scheme : Portals Open?
posts.body: The Portals for CM laptop Scheme has Opened. If you have 65% and above marks in intermediate, you can apply right now. Do not miss this golden chance .
posts.author: Bisma Ijaz
